description: W3C is the standards body that publishes web specifications, drafts, and related technical resources. It also operates public developer tools and validator services for checking web content and exposes public metadata about specifications, groups, organizations, and users.
summary: w3.org exposes public read-only HTTP surfaces: the W3C API at api.w3.org, the public standards/drafts catalog at /TR/, and public validator/checker HTTP endpoints such as the Nu Html Checker; no GraphQL, MCP server, CLI, or developer authentication surface was found.
